_comment: Authored by Claude. Daemon reads this on every loop. Update whenever thesis changes — daemon picks up within one tick. No numeric cap on alert count — every alert must be actively useful NOW (would you act on it with real money if it fires in the next hour?). Stale = remove. Signal-only / REMOTE / low-probability = remove.
pruned_by: manual rewrite 2026-04-23T19:34:33+00:00 — strip tick-REFRESH bloat, split entry-criterion (technical, sufficient) from regime-context (narrative, non-gating) per user request

level_alerts.note:
ENTRY: price tags 160.00; enter on M15 bar that closes BACK BELOW 160 with a rejection wick of 8+ pips from the high. No headline required.

CONTEXT: 160 is the MoF/BoJ verbal-intervention red line (Katayama G7 'bold action', prior intervention at 159.23 Jan 2026). Extension toward it increases fade probability but is not required for entry.

SL: 160.5  TP: 158.5  R:R target: 3.0

rewritten 2026-04-23T19:34:33+00:00 to separate entry criterion (technical, sufficient) from regime context (narrative, not gating).
level_alerts.proximity: 23.9p BELOW 160.00 → INSIDE 30p → swing=ARMED (counter-trend fade). |comp|=+40.5 mod 4/4 bull AGAINST sell → half-size (0.5%=$5). BOJ T-3d. Fires=1 decide-merits. Awaits 160.00 tag + M15 rejection wick ≥8p. H1ATR=0.117p H4ATR=0.279p; prox=max(0.117,0.140,30)=30p.
level_alerts.entry_criterion: price tags 160.00; enter on M15 bar that closes BACK BELOW 160 with a rejection wick of 8+ pips from the high. No headline required.
level_alerts.regime_context: 160 is the MoF/BoJ verbal-intervention red line (Katayama G7 'bold action'). FRESH: Katayama Apr 23 Bloomberg — 'constant close contact with US on FX'. BOJ Apr 27-28 hold at 0.75% expected but hawkish June signal strengthens JPY short-squeeze risk. Escalation of shoot-to-kill Iran orders supports USD safe-haven but BoJ intervention risk outweighs at 160 red line.
